summary: Weak performance with sub‑par Jerry guitar work and a lazy China Doll; recording source not identified.
review: The sole reviewer found the concert disappointing, calling out Jerry Garcia’s poor form and describing the second set as a sloppy practice session that culminated in a lackluster China Doll. No comments were made about the audio source or fidelity, so the technical quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, rating it 2 stars and focusing on negative musical aspects; insufficient data for a higher confidence assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not mention sound quality, mix, or source type, leaving recording characteristics unclear.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as a two‑song practice jam followed by a lazy rendition of China Doll; overall performance deemed sloppy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Not in good form according to reviewer.
